sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107085" key="u(pekpone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεκ-πονέω</orth>, <sense id="n107085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work out under</tr_> another's command, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
